name: Reflex Happy Hour Dog Treat Healthy Bones Lamb & Cranberry 60g
shortDescription: Promote your dog’s bone strength and overall wellness with Reflex Happy Hour Dog Treat Healthy Bones – crafted with lamb, egg protein, and natural cranberry extract.
description: Give your dog the gift of flavor and strength with Reflex Happy Hour Dog Treat Healthy Bones – Lamb & Egg . These delicious, crunchy morsels are specially formulated to support your dog’s bone health, mobility, and overall vitality. Made with premium lamb and egg protein, each bite provides high-quality nutrition packed with essential vitamins and minerals to keep your dog active and happy. Perfect for training or rewarding good behavior, these treats offer a satisfying crunch while helping maintain dental health. Infused with cranberry, glucosamine, and chondroitin sulfate , they help strengthen bones and joints naturally, making them ideal for dogs of all sizes and activity levels. Key Features: Supports strong bones and healthy joints Made with high-quality lamb and egg protein Enriched with glucosamine, chondroitin sulfate, and cranberry Crunchy texture helps maintain clean teeth Free from artificial preservatives and fillers Ingredients: Processed Lamb Protein (20%), Processed Animal Protein, Corn, Egg Protein, Chicken Fat, Wheat Bran, Hydrolyzed Lamb Protein, Liver Flavor, Powdered Cellulose, Vitamins and Minerals, Brewer's Yeast, Salt, Flaxseed, Cranberry, Yucca Schidigera, Mannan-Oligosaccharide (MOS), Glucosamine, Chondroitin Sulfate, L-Carnitine, Preservatives and Antioxidants (E320 & E321). Nutrient Components: Crude Protein: 24% Fat Content: 16% Crude Cellulose: 3% Raw Ash: 8% Moisture: 8% Feeding Recommendations: For adult dogs, it can be served as a treat or reward. Feeding amounts may vary depending on your pet’s activity level, lifestyle, and environmental conditions. Always provide access to fresh water. Store in a cool, dry place and reseal after each use.
